'''rachutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:heart|heart]]". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heart|heart]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rachutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræchitith|ræchitith]] || [[word:ræchitij|ræchitij]] || [[word:ræchitish|ræchitish]] || [[word:ræchiti|ræchiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rachuchututh|rachuchututh]] || [[word:rachuchutuj|rachuchutuj]] || [[word:rachuchutush|rachuchutush]] || [[word:rachuchutu|rachuchutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rachututh|rachututh]] || [[word:rachutuj|rachutuj]] || [[word:rachutush|rachutush]] || [[word:rachutu|rachutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rachuftuth|rachuftuth]] || [[word:rachuftuj|rachuftuj]] || [[word:rachuftush|rachuftush]] || [[word:rachuftuf|rachuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rachututhu|rachututhu]] || [[word:rachutuju|rachutuju]] || [[word:rachutushu|rachutushu]] || [[word:rachutuku|rachutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rachututh|rachututh]] || [[word:rachutuj|rachutuj]] || [[word:rachutush|rachutush]] || [[word:rachutu|rachutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rachututhul|rachututhul]] || [[word:rachutujul|rachutujul]] || [[word:rachutushul|rachutushul]] || [[word:rachutukul|rachutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rachututhuthu|rachututhuthu]] || [[word:rachutujuju|rachutujuju]] || [[word:rachutushushu|rachutushushu]] || [[word:rachutuku|rachutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rachututhun|rachututhun]] || [[word:rachutujun|rachutujun]] || [[word:rachutushun|rachutushun]] || [[word:rachutukun|rachutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rachututhuoro|rachututhuoro]] || [[word:rachutujuoro|rachutujuoro]] || [[word:rachutushuoro|rachutushuoro]] || [[word:rachutukuoro|rachutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
